creator: kris@pcbsd.org
text:
On 07/02/2012 06:24, dougb@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: ports: x11-wm/windowmaker fails if devel/libinotify is installed first
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: dougb
> State-Changed-When: Mon Jul 2 10:23:42 UTC 2012
> State-Changed-Why: 
>
> I cannot reproduce this on any of the systems I have, and
> the resulting wmaker binary is not linked against libnotify.
>
> This would seem to be an issue with your environment.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=167807

Don't think this is a problem on my environment. Not sure how you tested
it, but it fails in a clean tinderbox here:

http://mooreville.net:8080/tb/errors/8.0-FreeBSD/windowmaker-0.95.2_4.log

Just add this line to the LIB_DEPENDS= in Makefile to make sure it pulls
in libinotify to duplicate.

inotify.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libinotify \


-- 
Kris Moore
PC-BSD Software
iXsystems
